event: Alicia's Azaleas on St. Mary's River
description: A lush garden scene showing a dense mass of blooming azaleas in shades of pink, magenta, red, and white, nestled along a dark wooded riverbank. Tall slender tree trunks rise behind the floral display, forming a canopy of greenery. The river is barely visible at the right edge. The palette is rich and saturated, with thick impasto brushwork conveying the abundance of the blossoms against the deep shadows of the surrounding forest.

_meta.title: Alicia's Azaleas on St. Mary's River
